name: agent-desktop
description: Agent Desktop - 可切換 Claude Code／Codex CLI 的多引擎 Agent 協作平台

scripts.backend:compile:win: cd backend && python -m pip install -r requirements-build.txt && python -m PyInstaller --name claude-backend --add-data "presets;presets" --hidden-import aiohttp --hidden-import aiohttp_cors --hidden-import aiohttp.web_protocol --hidden-import aiohttp.web_middlewares --hidden-import aiohttp.web_urldispatcher --hidden-import multipart --hidden-import sqlite3 --hidden-import croniter --hidden-import faster_whisper --hidden-import opencc --collect-all aiohttp --collect-all aiohttp_cors --collect-all faster_whisper --collect-all ctranslate2 --collect-all av --collect-all opencc --exclude-module torch --exclude-module torchvision --exclude-module torchaudio --exclude-module tensorflow --exclude-module paddle main.py && (if exist claude-backend rmdir /s /q claude-backend) && xcopy /E /I /Y dist\claude-backend claude-backend
scripts.backend:compile:mac: cd backend && python3 -m pip install -r requirements-build.txt && pyinstaller --onefile --name claude-backend --add-data "presets:presets" --hidden-import aiohttp --hidden-import aiohttp_cors --hidden-import aiohttp.web_protocol --hidden-import aiohttp.web_middlewares --hidden-import aiohttp.web_urldispatcher --hidden-import multipart --hidden-import sqlite3 --hidden-import croniter --hidden-import faster_whisper --hidden-import opencc --collect-all aiohttp --collect-all aiohttp_cors --collect-all faster_whisper --collect-all ctranslate2 --collect-all av --collect-all opencc --exclude-module torch --exclude-module torchvision --exclude-module torchaudio --exclude-module tensorflow --exclude-module paddle main.py && cp dist/claude-backend claude-backend
scripts.backend:compile:linux: cd backend && python3 -m pip install -r requirements-build.txt && pyinstaller --onefile --name claude-backend --add-data "presets:presets" --hidden-import aiohttp --hidden-import aiohttp_cors --hidden-import aiohttp.web_protocol --hidden-import aiohttp.web_middlewares --hidden-import aiohttp.web_urldispatcher --hidden-import multipart --hidden-import sqlite3 --hidden-import croniter --hidden-import faster_whisper --hidden-import opencc --collect-all aiohttp --collect-all aiohttp_cors --collect-all faster_whisper --collect-all ctranslate2 --collect-all av --collect-all opencc --exclude-module torch --exclude-module torchvision --exclude-module torchaudio --exclude-module tensorflow --exclude-module paddle main.py && cp dist/claude-backend claude-backend
scripts.dist:win: npm run frontend:build && npm run backend:compile:win   && electron-builder --win
scripts.dist:mac: npm run frontend:build && npm run backend:compile:mac   && electron-builder --mac
scripts.dist:linux: npm run frontend:build && npm run backend:compile:linux && electron-builder --linux
